description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly black exterior accented by bold yellow trim. The side panels are decorated with vibrant graphics, including the text 'FIGHT FIGHTER II' in red, blue, and white, accompanied by a stylized blue fighter silhouette and yellow lightning motifs. The front houses a large, slightly recessed display screen with the words 'PLAYER 1 VS PLAYER 2' and a splash of red, suggesting a competitive fighting game. Below the screen, the control panel is equipped with two colored buttons (red and blue) and a single joystick, all set on a yellow surface. The top section includes a marquee area with matching 'FIGHT FIGHTER II' branding and a splash of color. The back of the cabinet is plain black, with no visible openings or features.
description: A black and yellow upright arcade game cabinet with bold side graphics, a 'FIGHT FIGHTER II' marquee, and a control panel featuring two buttons and a joystick.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the 'FIGHT FIGHTER II' graphics, blue fighter silhouette, and yellow lightning on the side panel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the screen with 'PLAYER 1 VS PLAYER 2', the yellow control panel with two buttons and a joystick, and the marquee artwork above.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with identical graphics and yellow trim visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain black back panel with no visible features or openings.
attribute_screen_type: CRT-style display, slightly curved with a thick bezel, medium size, typical of classic arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two large colored buttons (red and blue) arranged in a simple row on a yellow panel.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features 'FIGHT FIGHTER II' text in red, blue, and white with a splash of color, matching the game's fighting theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels display 'FIGHT FIGHTER II' text, a blue fighter silhouette, and yellow lightning motifs on a black background.
